subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Give thanks to the Almighty that thou hast inhaled the sweet fragrance of the gardens of the Abha Kingdom, obtaining new life thereby
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا شکر کن حضرت کبریا را که رائحۀ معطّر و معنبرِ ریاضِ ملکوتِ ابهی را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
